dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6970 IH: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to exclude from gross income the earnings from certain overseas deployments of members of the Armed Forces.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Rogers of Alabama introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to exclude from gross income the earnings from certain overseas deployments of members of the Armed Forces.

section.header: Combat zone exclusion expanded to include certain overseas deployments

subsection.text: Section 112(a) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking or at the end of paragraph (1), by striking the period at the end of paragraph (2) and inserting , or, and by inserting after paragraph (2) the following new paragraph:

Section 112(b) of such Code is amended by striking or at the end of paragraph (1), by striking the period at the end of paragraph (2) and inserting , or, and by inserting after paragraph (2) the following new paragraph:
Section 112(c) of such Code is amended by adding at the end the following new paragraphs:
The term overseas means any area outside the United States.
The term served overseas does not include service during any month or portion thereof during which the taxpayer is overseas pursuant to permanent change of station orders.
The term United States includes the territories and possessions of the United States.

paragraph.text: The heading of section 112 of such Code is amended by inserting and overseas after combat zone.
The table of sections for part III of subchapter B of chapter 1 of such Code is amended by striking the item relating to section 112 and inserting the following:

toc-entry.quote: Sec. 112. Certain combat zone and overseas compensation of members of the Armed Forces.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years beginning after December 31, 2025.
